project_type: Next.js 15 App Router dashboard application with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion
verification_instructions: Run pnpm lint and pnpm build from the frontend directory. Both must pass without errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Node 22, pnpm available. No Docker needed.
contribution_requirements: Must work in both dark and light mode. Follow the existing warm/minimalistic theme. NO pixel fonts inside the app. Commit changes but do NOT push.
key_patterns: Components use CSS variables like var(--text-primary), var(--surface-hover), var(--border). Framer Motion AnimatePresence for transitions. lucide-react for icons. Local state stored in localStorage with chronai- prefix. Tasks use LocalTask interface with id, status, priority, labels, recurrence fields. Gmail tasks have ids starting with task-gmail-. The TopBar z-index is z-[100]. The AI chat panel attached mode uses z-[80] for backdrop and z-[81] for panel.
directory_structure: frontend/app/dashboard/ - page routes (tasks, analytics, calendar, habits, planner, settings). frontend/components/ - shared components (PomodoroTimer, SpotifyMiniPlayer, etc). frontend/components/layout/ - AppShell, TopBar, Sidebar. frontend/components/chat/ - AIChatPanel, ChatExperience. frontend/components/ui/ - reusable UI primitives (Card, Button, Badge, Modal, etc). frontend/lib/ - API functions and utilities.
